title: App startup completes and landing UI becomes usable after splash animation
description: Verifies the splash animation plays on cold start and then the main landing UI becomes visible without blocking navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to the application landing page.
Wait for the splash screen animation to appear.
Wait for the splash screen animation to complete.
Verify the main page chrome is visible with the Navbar brand present.

title: Worker profile shows key contact and rate details
description: Verifies a client can open a worker profile and see city/location, phone number, and daily rate in MRU.

steps.description: Navigate directly to a worker profile route using the browser address bar.
Wait for the page to finish loading.
Verify the worker city or location is displayed.
Verify the worker phone number and daily rate in MRU are displayed.

title: Splash screen does not trap navigation when navigating away during startup
description: Verifies a user can navigate to another route while the splash screen is showing and still reach the destination once startup completes.

steps.description: Navigate to the application landing page.
Wait for the splash screen animation to appear.
Navigate to a worker profile route using the browser address bar.
Wait for the splash screen animation to complete.
Verify the worker profile page is displayed.

title: Deep-link cold start renders worker profile after splash without layout disruption
description: Verifies that direct navigation to a worker profile from a cold start shows the splash screen and then renders the worker profile cleanly.

steps.description: Navigate directly to a worker profile route using the browser address bar.
Wait for the splash screen animation to appear.
Wait for the splash screen animation to complete.
Verify the worker profile page is displayed with the site Navbar visible.

title: Invalid worker id fails gracefully without breaking page chrome
description: Verifies navigating to a worker profile with an invalid id shows a safe fallback state without crashing and keeps the Navbar visible.

steps.description: Navigate directly to a worker profile route using an invalid id in the browser address bar.
Wait for the page to finish loading.
Verify a safe fallback state is shown for the worker profile instead of a broken page.
Verify the Navbar remains visible and usable.

title: Worker profile renders gracefully when some contact fields are missing
description: Verifies the worker profile page remains usable when one or more of city, phone, or daily rate are absent and shows a safe fallback UI.

steps.description: Navigate directly to a worker profile route expected to have incomplete contact information.
Wait for the page to finish loading.
Verify the profile page renders without crashes and shows a safe fallback for missing details.
Verify the available contact/rate details still display where present.
